<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Eric Paterson — Electronic Press Kit</title>
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap');

:root {
  --void: #07090e;
  --deep: #0c1018;
  --panel: #101520;
  --rim: #1a2130;
  --junira: #6ee7c4;
  --junira-dim: #2e8a6a;
  --astral: #a78bfa;
  --gold: #d4a017;
  --text: #cdd6e8;
  --muted: #5e6e85;
  --accent: #f0c674;
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body {
  background: var(--void);
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* STARFIELD */
#starfield { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; }

/* NAV */
nav {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
  background: rgba(7,9,14,0.88);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rim);
}
.nav-inner {
  max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 54px;
}
.nav-brand {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--junira); text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
}
.nav-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; list-style: none; }
.nav-links a {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s;
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--junira); }
@media(max-width:600px){ .nav-links { display: none; } }

/* LAYOUT */
.container { max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 28px; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
.section { padding: 80px 0; }
.section-tag {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.28em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--junira-dim); margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.section-heading {
  font-size: clamp(26px, 4vw, 38px); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  margin-bottom: 28px; line-height: 1.1;
}
hr.div { border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--rim); margin: 0; }

/* HERO */
.hero {
  min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
  padding: 100px 0 80px; position: relative;
}
.hero-eyebrow {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.28em;
  color: var(--junira); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.hero-name {
  font-size: clamp(48px, 8vw, 88px); font-weight: 700; line-height: 0.95;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em; margin-bottom: 14px; color: var(--text);
}
.hero-name span { color: var(--junira); }
.hero-tagline {
  font-size: clamp(15px, 2.5vw, 20px); font-weight: 300; color: var(--astral);
  letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.hero-bio {
  font-size: 16px; color: var(--muted); max-width: 580px;
  margin-bottom: 44px; line-height: 1.8;
}
.hero-bio strong { color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; }
.stats-row { display: flex; gap: 36px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 48px; }
.stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; }
.stat-val { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--junira); }
.stat-label { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); }
.btn-row { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.btn {
  display: inline-block; padding: 13px 26px; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
}
.btn-p { background: var(--junira); color: var(--void); font-weight: 700; }
.btn-p:hover { background: #90edd4; }
.btn-g { background: transparent; color: var(--junira); border: 1px solid var(--junira-dim); }
.btn-g:hover { border-color: var(--junira); background: rgba(110,231,196,0.07); }
.glow { position: absolute; right: -40px; top: 45%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 360px; height: 360px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(110,231,196,0.09) 0%, rgba(167,139,250,0.05) 50%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; }

/* ABOUT GRID */
.about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 20px; margin-top: 12px; }
@media(max-width:620px){ .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.about-card {
  background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--rim); border-radius: 6px; padding: 24px;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.about-card::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--junira), var(--astral));
}
.about-card-icon { font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.about-card-title {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: var(--junira); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.about-card p { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.65; }
.about-card p strong { color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; }

/* UNIVERSE */
.lore-block {
  background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--rim);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--junira); border-radius: 6px; padding: 28px 32px; margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.lore-block h3 { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.lore-block p { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.75; }
.lore-block p strong { color: var(--junira); font-weight: 500; }

.race-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-top: 28px; }
.race-card {
  background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--rim); border-radius: 6px; padding: 20px;
}
.race-name {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--accent); letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.race-sound { font-size: 11px; color: var(--astral); letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.race-card p { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; }

/* CATALOG */
.catalog-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 24px; margin-top: 8px; }
.release-card {
  background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--rim); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
}
.release-card:hover { border-color: var(--junira-dim); }
.release-art { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; object-fit: cover; display: block; }
.release-art-placeholder {
  width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; background: var(--deep);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 48px; color: var(--muted);
}
.release-body { padding: 20px; }
.release-label {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.22em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--astral); margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.release-title { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px; color: var(--text); }
.release-meta { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 10px; }
.release-desc { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; }

/* GEMSTONE SERIES */
.gem-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 28px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 36px; }
.gem-art-stack { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; width: 240px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.gem-art-stack img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 4px; display: block; }
.gem-info { flex: 1; min-width: 240px; }
.gem-info h3 { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.gem-info p { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.gem-timeline { list-style: none; }
.gem-timeline li {
  display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: baseline;
  padding: 7px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rim); font-size: 13px;
}
.gem-year { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: var(--junira); min-width: 36px; }
.gem-name { font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); }
.gem-note { color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; margin-left: auto; }

/* CREDENTIALS */
.cred-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-top: 8px; }
.cred-card {
  background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--rim); border-radius: 6px; padding: 22px;
  display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start;
}
.cred-icon { font-size: 24px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; }
.cred-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; color: var(--text); }
.cred-desc { font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.55; }

/* PITCH */
.pitch-box {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(110,231,196,0.05), rgba(167,139,250,0.05));
  border: 1px solid var(--rim); border-radius: 8px; padding: 40px; margin: 40px 0;
  text-align: center;
}
.pitch-box h3 { font-size: clamp(20px, 3vw, 28px); font-weight: 300; font-style: italic; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.45; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.pitch-box p { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto; }
.pitch-box strong { color: var(--junira); }

/* LINKS */
.links-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 14px; margin-top: 8px; }
.link-card {
  background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--rim); border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 18px 20px; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px;
}
.link-card:hover { border-color: var(--junira-dim); }
.link-platform { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); }
.link-handle { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--junira); }

/* CONTACT */
.contact-block {
  background: var(--panel); border: 1px solid var(--rim);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); border-radius: 6px; padding: 32px 36px;
}
.contact-block h3 { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.contact-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: baseline; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 15px; }
.contact-label { font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); min-width: 80px; }
.contact-val { color: var(--text); }

/* FOOTER */
footer { border-top: 1px solid var(--rim); padding: 40px 0; text-align: center; }
footer p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
footer strong { color: var(--text); }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<canvas id="starfield"></canvas>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="#" class="nav-brand">ERIC PATERSON</a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="#universe">Universe</a></li>
      <li><a href="#catalog">Catalog</a></li>
      <li><a href="#credentials">Credits</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</nav>

<div class="container">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="glow"></div>
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">Electronic Press Kit · 2026 · Ynnzana Studio</div>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Eric<br><span>Paterson</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Composer · World Builder · Game Developer</p>
    <p class="hero-bio">
      <strong>Seventeen years.</strong> That's how long Eric Paterson has been building — music, worlds, games, and an expanding universe that spans multiple civilizations, two planets, and a catalog of 100+ released compositions approaching 200. Based in Cranbrook, BC and entirely self-taught.
    </p>
    <div class="stats-row">
      <div class="stat"><span class="stat-val">17</span><span class="stat-label">Years Creating</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><span class="stat-val">100+</span><span class="stat-label">Released Tracks</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><span class="stat-val">5</span><span class="stat-label">Civilizations Scored</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><span class="stat-val">1</span><span class="stat-label">Shipped Steam Game</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="btn-row">
      <a href="#catalog" class="btn btn-p">Explore the Catalog</a>
      <a href="#universe" class="btn btn-g">Enter the Universe</a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <hr class="div">

  <!-- ABOUT -->
  <section class="section" id="about">
    <div class="section-tag">The Artist</div>
    <h2 class="section-heading">About Eric Paterson</h2>
    <p style="color:var(--muted);max-width:640px;margin-bottom:32px;font-size:15px;line-height:1.8;">
      Eric Paterson started with an internet connection at 12, FL Studio at 14, and a childhood shaped by One Piece, Naruto, Bleach, and Death Note — anime that taught him a world could matter as much as a story. He never stopped drawing characters. He never stopped building. By 2013, at 19, the earliest seeds of ARP-336 were planted. December 2026 marks 13 years of continuous world development.
      <br><br>
      He is 99% self-taught across music production, composition, game development, 3D asset creation, and creative writing — no formal training, no institution, just vision and iteration over nearly two decades. He shed his former producer alias to operate under his real name, because the universe he built got too large to hide behind a persona.
      <br><br>
      His studio is named <strong style="color:var(--junira)">Ynnzana</strong> — the Eiidoran word for "star gate." Everything he creates comes through it.
    </p>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-card">
        <div class="about-card-icon">🎵</div>
        <div class="about-card-title">Music</div>
        <p>Composer across ambient, orchestral, drum and bass, and Middle Eastern/Indian fusion. <strong>45+ tracks</strong> scored to a science-fantasy universe, growing toward 300. OST streaming on Spotify and Apple Music.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-card">
        <div class="about-card-icon">🎮</div>
        <div class="about-card-title">Game Development</div>
        <p>Shipped <strong>Labyrinth of Rage</strong> on Steam — free to play, full campaign, original orchestral soundtrack. Working in <strong>Unreal Engine, Unity,</strong> and <strong>Blender</strong>. PSX-style 3D model creation and asset sales — <strong style="color:var(--accent)">coming soon.</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div class="about-card">
        <div class="about-card-icon">📖</div>
        <div class="about-card-title">Writing</div>
        <p>Author of <strong>ARP-336: Astral Odyssey</strong>, a science-fantasy novel set in the polar ring galaxy of Nanüva. Three historical eras, a crystalline energy system, and a protagonist named Dante.</p>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <hr class="div">

  <!-- UNIVERSE -->
  <section class="section" id="universe">
    <div class="section-tag">The World</div>
    <h2 class="section-heading">ARP-336 Universe</h2>

    <div class="lore-block">
      <h3>Nanüva & the Polar Ring Galaxy</h3>
      <p>ARP-336 is named after a real polar ring galaxy — a galaxy with two perpendicular rings of stars. Nanüva is a world within it, home to multiple native civilizations, a contested crystalline energy system called <strong>Junira Dewan</strong>, and three distinct historical eras that shape politics, religion, and conflict. The story follows a protagonist named Dante across a universe where the line between energy, consciousness, and identity is dangerously thin.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="lore-block">
      <h3>Junira Dewan — The Crystal Energy System</h3>
      <p>A network of crystalline formations found across Nanüva. Equal parts natural resource, spiritual foundation, and weapon. Every civilization relates to Junira Dewan differently — and that relationship defines their sound, their architecture, and their fate. The gemstone aesthetic of Eric's separate DnB catalog is a deliberate echo of this system.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="lore-block">
      <h3>Ynnzana — The Star Gates of Eiidora</h3>
      <p>Built by the <strong>Eiidoran</strong> civilization of the planet Eiidora, Ynnzana are interplanetary and intercontinental teleportation gates. Eric named his studio after them. Every release under @ynnzanastudio passed through one.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="section-tag" style="margin-top:40px;">The Civilizations</div>
    <p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;margin-bottom:4px;">Each race has its own sonic identity. The ARP-336 catalog is organized by civilization — not genre.</p>
    <div class="race-grid">
      <div class="race-card">
        <div class="race-name">Nezran</div>
        <div class="race-sound">Ambient</div>
        <p>Native race of Nanüva. Their temples — sky, water, earth — are scored with deep atmospheric textures. Spiritual and ancient.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="race-card">
        <div class="race-name">Grym'bohl</div>
        <div class="race-sound">Classical Middle Eastern / Indian</div>
        <p>A civilization with rich cultural instrumentation — oud, sitar, tabla textures woven into their towns, rituals, and sacred spaces.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="race-card">
        <div class="race-name">Human</div>
        <div class="race-sound">Epic Orchestral</div>
        <p>Expansionist and militaristic. Their score is full ensemble — sweeping, dramatic, built for empires and wars.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="race-card">
        <div class="race-name">Eiidoran</div>
        <div class="race-sound">Upbeat Ambient</div>
        <p>Inhabitants of the planet Eiidora. Builders of the Ynnzana star gates. Their music is lighter, hopeful, and harmonically curious.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <hr class="div">

  <!-- CATALOG -->
  <section class="section" id="catalog">
    <div class="section-tag">The Catalog</div>
    <h2 class="section-heading">Releases</h2>

    <!-- ARP-336 OST -->
    <div style="margin-bottom:48px;">
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:16px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rim);">Primary Pitch — ARP-336: Astral Odyssey OST</p>
      <div class="lore-block" style="border-left-color:var(--accent);">
        <h3>ARP-336: Astral Odyssey — Original Soundtrack</h3>
        <p>A catalog of <strong style="color:var(--text)">100+ original compositions</strong> scored to the ARP-336 universe — organized by civilization, not genre. Ambient, orchestral, Middle Eastern/Indian fusion, and upbeat ambient, each mapped to a specific race and their locations, temples, towns, and story moments. The catalog is growing toward <strong style="color:var(--text)">200 tracks</strong> across five civilization folders. This is not an album. It is a sonic atlas of a world.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- GEMSTONE SERIES -->
    <div style="margin-bottom:48px;">
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--astral);margin-bottom:20px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rim);">Gemstone EP Series — Drum & Bass</p>
      <div class="gem-header">
        <div class="gem-art-stack">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Moldavite EP">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Amethyst EP">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Emerald EP">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Syzygy EP">
        </div>
        <div class="gem-info">
          <h3>The Gemstone EP Series</h3>
          <p>A ten-EP drum and bass series released under Eric Paterson, each named after a gemstone. Sonically independent, yet canon within the ARP-336 universe — the music exists as recordings made aboard the <strong style="color:var(--text)">Phoenix</strong>, humanity's generation ship during the Origins/Exodus saga. The gemstone imagery deliberately echoes the Junira Dewan crystal energy system of Nanüva, connecting the DnB catalog to the wider universe.</p>
          <p>Each EP contains 5 tracks. Syzygy (3 tracks) is a canonical entry — an unexpected event in the Phoenix's journey that broke the pattern but couldn't be ignored.</p>
          <ul class="gem-timeline">
            <li><span class="gem-year">2023</span><span class="gem-name">Moldavite</span><span class="gem-note">5 tracks</span></li>
            <li><span class="gem-year">2025</span><span class="gem-name">Syzygy</span><span class="gem-note">3 tracks</span></li>
            <li><span class="gem-year">Feb 2026</span><span class="gem-name">Amethyst</span><span class="gem-note">5 tracks</span></li>
            <li><span class="gem-year">May 2026</span><span class="gem-name">Emerald</span><span class="gem-note">5 tracks</span></li>
            <li><span class="gem-year">TBD</span><span class="gem-name">Ruby · Sapphire · Lapis Lazuli · Jade · Citrine · Moonstone · Obsidian · Diamond</span><span class="gem-note">upcoming</span></li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- OTHER RELEASES -->
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:20px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rim);">Additional Releases</p>
    <div class="catalog-grid">
      <div class="release-card">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Labyrinth of Rage OST" class="release-art">
        <div class="release-body">
          <div class="release-label">Game Soundtrack · Steam</div>
          <div class="release-title">Labyrinth of Rage OST</div>
          <div class="release-meta">2023–2024 · Epic Orchestral · Spotify & Apple Music</div>
          <div class="release-desc">Original score for the free-to-play Steam game Labyrinth of Rage. Full campaign, multiple bosses, complete orchestral soundtrack. Eric's first shipped game title as both developer and composer.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="release-card">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="In the Garden of Zen" class="release-art">
        <div class="release-body">
          <div class="release-label">Album Series · Back Catalogue</div>
          <div class="release-title">In the Garden of Zen I, II &amp; III</div>
          <div class="release-meta">Vol. I &amp; II released · Vol. III — September 2026 · Ambient</div>
          <div class="release-desc">A repackaged back-catalogue release spanning three volumes. Meditative, atmospheric ambient music — the sonic origins of the world Eric has been quietly building for over a decade.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <hr class="div">

  <!-- PITCH BLOCK -->
  <div class="container">
    <div class="pitch-box">
      <h3>"This isn't a demo. It's a franchise pitch. A self-taught composer, game developer, and world builder who has been constructing a multi-civilization universe for 13 years — and is only now ready to let labels in."</h3>
      <p>ARP-336 arrives with a complete fictional universe, a growing 100+ track sonic atlas, a shipped Steam game, and an in-progress novel. <strong>Multiple income layers. One vision.</strong></p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="div">

  <!-- CREDENTIALS -->
  <section class="section" id="credentials">
    <div class="section-tag">Professional Credits</div>
    <h2 class="section-heading">Why Now</h2>
    <div class="cred-row">
      <div class="cred-card">
        <div class="cred-icon">🎮</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cred-title">Shipped Game on Steam</div>
          <div class="cred-desc">Labyrinth of Rage — free to play, full campaign, original OST. Available now at store.steampowered.com/app/2492560</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cred-card">
        <div class="cred-icon">🎧</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cred-title">Streaming on All Platforms</div>
          <div class="cred-desc">Spotify, Apple Music, TIDAL, Beatport, and more. Gemstone EPs and Labyrinth of Rage OST live and indexed.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cred-card">
        <div class="cred-icon">📅</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cred-title">Consistent Release History</div>
          <div class="cred-desc">Active releases from 2023 to present. Moldavite (2023), Syzygy (2025), Amethyst (Feb 2026), Emerald (May 2026).</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cred-card">
        <div class="cred-icon">🌍</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cred-title">13-Year Universe in Development</div>
          <div class="cred-desc">ARP-336 began in 2013. December 2026 marks 13 years. The lore, the races, the languages — all built independently.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cred-card">
        <div class="cred-icon">⚙️</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cred-title">Full-Stack Creative</div>
          <div class="cred-desc">Music production, game development (Unreal Engine/Blender), 3D asset creation, novel writing, and visual AI art — all in-house.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cred-card">
        <div class="cred-icon">🇨🇦</div>
        <div>
          <div class="cred-title">Canadian — Grant Eligible</div>
          <div class="cred-desc">Based in Cranbrook, BC. Eligible for FACTOR Canada, Canada Council for the Arts, and BC Arts Council funding — stackable with a label advance.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <hr class="div">

  <!-- LINKS -->
  <section class="section" id="links">
    <div class="section-tag">Find the Music</div>
    <h2 class="section-heading">Streaming & Socials</h2>
    <div class="links-grid">
      <a href="https://open.spotify.com" class="link-card" target="_blank">
        <span class="link-platform">Spotify</span>
        <span class="link-handle">Eric Paterson</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://music.apple.com/in/artist/eric-paterson/1732243876" class="link-card" target="_blank">
        <span class="link-platform">Apple Music</span>
        <span class="link-handle">Eric Paterson</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://tidal.com/artist/17624274" class="link-card" target="_blank">
        <span class="link-platform">TIDAL</span>
        <span class="link-handle">Eric Paterson</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.beatport.com/artist/eric-paterson/1205733/tracks" class="link-card" target="_blank">
        <span class="link-platform">Beatport</span>
        <span class="link-handle">Eric Paterson</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@YnnzanaStudio" class="link-card" target="_blank">
        <span class="link-platform">YouTube</span>
        <span class="link-handle">@ynnzanastudio</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.instagram.com/ynnzanastudio" class="link-card" target="_blank">
        <span class="link-platform">Instagram</span>
        <span class="link-handle">@ynnzanastudio</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@ynnzanastudio" class="link-card" target="_blank">
        <span class="link-platform">TikTok</span>
        <span class="link-handle">@ynnzanastudio</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/2492560/Labyrinth_of_Rage/" class="link-card" target="_blank">
        <span class="link-platform">Steam</span>
        <span class="link-handle">Labyrinth of Rage</span>
      </a>
      <a href="https://linktr.ee/EricPaterson" class="link-card" target="_blank">
        <span class="link-platform">All Links</span>
        <span class="link-handle">linktr.ee/EricPaterson</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <hr class="div">

  <!-- CONTACT -->
  <section class="section" id="contact">
    <div class="section-tag">For Labels & Industry</div>
    <h2 class="section-heading">Contact</h2>
    <div class="contact-block">
      <h3>A&R, Press, Sync & Licensing Inquiries</h3>
      <div class="contact-row">
        <span class="contact-label">Artist</span>
        <span class="contact-val">Eric Paterson</span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-row">
        <span class="contact-label">Studio</span>
        <span class="contact-val">Ynnzana Studio</span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-row">
        <span class="contact-label">Based</span>
        <span class="contact-val">Cranbrook, BC, Canada</span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-row">
        <span class="contact-label">Email</span>
        <span class="contact-val"><a href="mailto:ynnzanastudio@gmail.com" style="color:var(--text);">ynnzanastudio@gmail.com</a></span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-row">
        <span class="contact-label">Links</span>
        <span class="contact-val">linktr.ee/EricPaterson</span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-row">
        <span class="contact-label">Demos</span>
        <span class="contact-val">Available on request — ARP-336 OST, Gemstone EPs, Labyrinth of Rage OST</span>
      </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

</div>

<footer>
  <div class="container">
    <p><strong>Eric Paterson</strong> · Ynnzana Studio</p>
    <p>Electronic Press Kit · 2026 · Cranbrook, BC, Canada</p>
    <p style="margin-top:16px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.2em;color:var(--junira-dim);text-align:center;">ARP-336</p>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('starfield');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
let stars = [];
function resize(){ canvas.width = window.innerWidth; canvas.height = window.innerHeight; }
function init(){
  stars = [];
  for(let i=0;i<200;i++) stars.push({
    x: Math.random()*canvas.width, y: Math.random()*canvas.height,
    r: Math.random()*1.3+0.2, a: Math.random(),
    speed: Math.random()*0.003+0.001, phase: Math.random()*Math.PI*2
  });
}
function draw(t){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
  for(const s of stars){
    const a = s.a*(0.4+0.6*Math.sin(t*s.speed+s.phase));
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(s.x,s.y,s.r,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(180,210,255,${a})`; ctx.fill();
  }
}
let lt=0;
function loop(t){ if(t-lt>16){draw(t);lt=t;} requestAnimationFrame(loop); }
resize(); init(); loop(0);
window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{resize();init();});
</script>
</body>
</html>
